question: What are your business hours?
answer: Our support team is available Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM (local time). We are closed on public holidays.
keywords: open close timing available working hours

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Go to the login page and click 'Forgot Password'. Enter your registered email address and follow the link we send you to create a new password.
keywords: forgot login credentials cant sign in access account

question: How can I track my order?
answer: Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking link by email. You can also track it anytime from the 'My Orders' section in your account.
keywords: package arrive status shipment where is my order tracking number

question: What is your return policy?
answer: You can return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund, as long as they are unused and in their original packaging.
keywords: send back exchange unwanted item policy

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
answer: Go to Account Settings > Subscription > Cancel Subscription. Your plan will remain active until the end of the current billing cycle.
keywords: stop membership unsubscribe end plan billing

question: Do you offer refunds?
answer: Yes, refunds are issued to your original payment method within 5-7 business days after we receive and inspect the returned item.
keywords: money back reimbursement get my money

question: How can I contact customer support?
answer: You can reach us via live chat on our website, by emailing support@example.com, or by calling our helpline during business hours.
keywords: help talk human reach team phone email chat

question: Do you ship internationally?
answer: Yes, we ship to over 50 countries. International shipping costs and delivery times vary depending on your location.
keywords: abroad overseas other countries deliver worldwide

question: How long does delivery take?
answer: Standard delivery usually takes 3-5 business days domestically, and 7-14 business days for international orders.
keywords: arrive when shipping time duration days

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept major credit/debit cards, PayPal, and other regional payment options shown at checkout.
keywords: pay card paypal checkout accepted options

question: Can I change my shipping address after placing an order?
answer: You can update your shipping address within 1 hour of placing the order by contacting support, as long as it hasn't shipped yet.
keywords: update wrong address edit modify order

question: Is my personal information secure?
answer: Yes, we use industry-standard encryption to protect your personal and payment information, and we never share your data with third parties without consent.

question: How do I create an account?
answer: Click 'Sign Up' at the top of the page, enter your email and a password, and verify your email address to activate your account.
keywords: sign up register new account join

question: Do you have a mobile app?
answer: Yes, our mobile app is available for both Android and iOS. You can download it from the Google Play Store or Apple App Store.
keywords: app android ios download install phone application

question: What should I do if I received a damaged item?
answer: Please contact support within 48 hours of delivery with photos of the damaged item, and we'll arrange a replacement or refund.
keywords: broken defective faulty damaged item wrong item
